examples: The former inhabitant of the Canary Isles continued his dithyrambic.
When the curtain of night fall down soundless, when the mountain and water disappear from your eyes, when to the end of the dithyrambic evening.
Epic poetry and Tragedy, Comedy also and Dithyrambic poetry, and the music of the flute and of the lyre in most of their forms, are all in their general conception modes of imitation.
